extDesc.message: Write quick notes from the toolbar. They stay saved on this device.

noteListHelp.message: In the notes list, press Tab to move between a note's select and delete buttons. Use Up and Down Arrow to move between notes, Home for the first note, and End for the last note.

placeholder.message: Select a note, or create a new one.

confirmDelete.message: Are you sure you want to delete this note?

emptyNoteListDescription.message: Start writing in the note area below to create your first note and save it on this device.

onboardingGuide.message: Start in the note area below. Just type and it saves.

firstNotePlaceholder.message: Add a thought or task here. No save button needed.

emptySearchResultsDescription.message: Try a shorter search term or different words.

premiumLimit.message: You can create up to $COUNT$ notes on the free plan. Upgrade to Premium for unlimited notes.
